assertions.text: Editorial promise is one sentence testable against any edition
Target reader description includes at least one frustration

one-sentence-promise.note: Promise testable: every edition helps working freelancers make more money or avoid losing it

reader-frustration.note: Frustration: good at writing, bad at business; learns every lesson the hard way

restrictive-exclusions.note: Excludes: craft advice, fiction writing, academic publishing, motivational content

reader-frustration.note: Frustration: overwhelmed by release lists, wants curation not volume

restrictive-exclusions.note: Exclusions present though slightly less sharp due to minimal input

one-sentence-promise.note: Promise: connect the dots across European housing policy borders

reader-frustration.note: Frustration: national media covers crisis in isolation; no cross-border view

restrictive-exclusions.note: Excludes: single-country analysis, real estate investment advice, construction industry news
